name: geeky-orchestration
description: Plan, review, execute, inspect, and archive feature work with an intelligent geeky-orchestrator, portable agent projections, durable planning packets, and deterministic quality gates.

interface.shortDescription: Route and administer feature delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: An intelligent geeky-orchestrator routes requests and administers the lifecycle across feature planning, plan review, implementation, implementation review, status checks, archiving, and spec research. Includes portable agent projections, planning-packet validators, task templates, advisory hooks, and an optional MCP server for quality gates.
defaultPrompt: Examine this repository and recommend the appropriate Geeky Orchestration workflow.
Create a geeky-plan packet for this feature.
Review this implementation plan before execution.
